description_long: This lamp features a minimalist, modern design with a matte black finish. Its structure consists of a circular, flat base supporting a single, smoothly curved arm that extends horizontally before angling downward. The lamp head is a conical shade with a pointed metallic or light-colored tip, likely serving as a decorative accent or light diffuser. The overall form is sleek and geometric, with clean lines and no visible switches or controls. The lamp appears to be constructed primarily from metal, giving it a sturdy and durable appearance. Its compact size and contemporary style make it suitable for use on desks or tables in urban environments.
description: A sleek, modern black lamp with a curved arm and conical shade, featuring a metallic tip and circular base. Its minimalist design is both functional and stylish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the curved arm, conical shade, and round base, highlighting the lamp's profile.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the pointed tip of the conical shade directly above the base, emphasizing the lamp's symmetry.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with the curved arm and conical shade visible from the other direction.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the conical shade and the circular base, with the arm mostly hidden.
